case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. TIFFANY C. MAYBON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYBON, TIFFANY C. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
